user.title: Connect to EcoFlow
user.description: Enter the same email and password you use in the EcoFlow mobile app (US cloud).

device.title: Select Power Ocean
device.description: Choose the Power Ocean inverter to import into Home Assistant.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the EcoFlow cloud API.
error.api_not_mapped: The EcoFlow app API is not mapped yet. Capture app traffic and update pyecoflowocean first.
error.no_devices: No Power Ocean devices were found on this account.
error.device_not_found: The selected device could not be found.

abort.already_configured: This Power Ocean system is already configured.
